name: Coding Agent Skills
description: Exposes dependency-free, read-only coding-agent-skills CLI audits as optional OpenClaw tools.

binaryPath.description: Path or command name for the installed coding-agent-skills CLI.

timeoutMs.description: Maximum runtime for a single coding-agent-skills command.

binaryPath.label: coding-agent-skills binary
binaryPath.help: Defaults to coding-agent-skills on PATH. Do not point this at npx or a shell wrapper.

timeoutMs.label: Command timeout
timeoutMs.help: Bounded timeout in milliseconds for read-only CLI invocations.
